This AnimBP can be used in the editor as a Post Process Instance to modify an animation, which can then be recorded / exported as a new asset. Below is the logic I used on the M4A1 Run and Sprint animations so that it plays only on the arms, which I then exported as a new asset for use in the main AnimBP.

This is a technique I used as a timesaver, so I didnt have to further edit the animation in maya.
